days.label: Push Day ? Chest, Shoulders & Triceps
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + arm circles + band pull-aparts

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 130 ? still waiting for 10/10/10 at RPE 8 or under across all three sets. No log came in this week, so no movement. Same ask as the last two weeks: full reps, controlled descent, pause at the chest, drive through the heels. Third set is where you keep losing it ? manage fatigue early so you have something left. Log it this time.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 45 ? no push day log came in this week so no movement. You earned the bump to 45 two weeks ago with a clean 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7. We need to see how it actually goes at this weight. 30-degree incline, control the negative, full range of motion. Aim for 8-10 at RPE 7-8 and log every set.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? no log this week, no movement. You were at 10/10/10 RPE 7/7/8 two weeks ago ? close but set 3 was still at 8. Need all three sets at RPE 7 to earn 35. Brace the core, don't lean back into the reps, full lockout at the top. Log it.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Staying at 12 ? no push day log this week so no movement. You bumped to 12 lb dumbbells two weeks ago after 12/12/12 at RPE 6/7/7. Need to see 12/12/12 here before moving up. Slight bend in elbows, lead with the elbows, 2-second hold at the top, slow controlled negative. Log whether the pause is actually happening.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 ? no log this week, no movement. Two weeks ago you went 10/10/9 at RPE 7/7/9. Set 3 keeps dropping a rep and spiking RPE ? this is a late-session fatigue issue. Need 10/10/10 at RPE 8 or under to earn 105. Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked tight, full lockout every rep. Manage your energy ? this comes near the end of the session.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.notes: ROTATION IN ? swapping out tricep rope pushdown this week to hit the triceps from a stretched position. You've been on rope pushdowns for several weeks. Overhead extension hits the long head of the tricep which is undertrained in that position. Single DB, both hands, elbows tight to the sides of your head, lower slowly until you feel the stretch, press to full lockout. Start at 30 lbs, aim for 10-12 at RPE 7-8. Log the exact weight.

days.cooldown: Stretch chest, shoulders, and triceps ? 5 min

days.label: Pull Day ? Back, Biceps & Rear Delts
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + band pull-aparts + cat-cow stretches

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 195 ? no pull day log this week, no movement. Two weeks ago you went 9/8/8 at RPE 7/7/8 ? trending up from the week before but not there yet. Need 9-10 reps on all 3 sets at RPE 8 or under to earn 205. Brace hard before you pull, squeeze the lats tight, drive through the floor, controlled descent. That extra rep on sets 2 and 3 is right there ? go get it.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: Staying at 55 ? no pull log this week, no movement. You earned 55 two weeks ago with a clean 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7. Need to confirm you can hold that at the new weight. Pull to the hip, full second squeeze at the top, slow the negative. Each side. Log reps and RPE per side.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 ? no log this week, no movement. Two weeks ago you went 10/10/10 at RPE 7/8/9 ? top of the range but that set 3 RPE 9 is still the blocker. Three weeks in a row with RPE escalating through the session. Need all 3 sets at RPE 7 to earn 110. Wide grip, pull to upper chest, squeeze the lats at the bottom, no leaning back into a row. Reset your breathing between reps.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: Staying at 55 ? no pull log this week, no movement. Two weeks ago your first session at 55 was inconsistent: set 1 hit 12 at RPE 8, sets 2 and 3 hit 15 at RPE 8. Now that you know the weight, standardize it. Aim for 12-15 across all 3 sets at RPE 7-8. Rope at upper pulley, pull to your face, thumbs behind you at the finish. This is a shoulder health exercise ? don't rush the reps.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 70 ? no pull log this week, no movement. You earned 70 two weeks ago with the cleanest curl log you've had: 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7, no swinging. Need to see that again at the new weight before moving up. Full squeeze at the top, slow the negative, elbows stay pinned. If RPE jumps, that's your form breaking down ? tighten it up.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? no pull log this week, no movement. We introduced this two weeks ago to replace hammer curls while your forearms recovered. This is the first confirmed session at this weight. Lie perpendicular across the bench, DB behind your head, arms slightly bent. Lower slowly until you feel the stretch across your chest and lats, then pull back over. Aim for 10-12 at RPE 7. Log the weight and we'll build from here.

days.cooldown: Stretch lats, biceps, and upper back ? 5 min

days.label: Leg Day ? Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes & Core
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + bodyweight squats + leg swings

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 165 ? you finally logged Friday and here's where you are: 9/8/8 at RPE 8/8/8. Set 1 was good, sets 2 and 3 dropped a rep each. You're consistent on effort but losing steam mid-session. Need 9-10 reps across all 3 sets at RPE 8 or under to earn 175. Below parallel, brace before you unrack, drive through the heels. Don't let set 2 fall off ? that's where this is slipping.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 145 ? you logged this week: 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7. That's exactly what we needed. Clean across all three sets and RPE is right where we want it. To earn 155 next week, need the same performance ? 10/10/10 at RPE 7 across the board. Slight knee bend, push the hips back, feel the hamstring stretch, bar close to the shins on the descent. One more clean week and you're moving up.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? you logged this week: 10/10/10 at RPE 8/8/8. Consistent, but capped at 10 reps and RPE is at the ceiling. Need 12/12/12 per side to earn 35 ? you've been stuck at 10 reps for a few weeks now. Rear foot on the bench, drop straight down, drive through the front heel. This week intentionally push past 10 on every set. The reps are in there.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Staying at 75 ? you logged this week at the new weight: 12/12/10 at RPE 7/7/8. Really solid first session here. Sets 1 and 2 were clean, set 3 dropped 2 reps and hit RPE 8. Need 12/12/12 at RPE 8 or under to earn 85. Upper back on the bench, drive through the heels, full hip extension, squeeze the glutes hard at the top and hold a full second. You're close ? lock in that third set.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 65 ? you logged this week: 10/10/10 at RPE 8/8/9. That's a step back from two weeks ago when you hit 15/15/15 at RPE 6/6/7. Reps dropped significantly and RPE climbed. Something went sideways ? fatigue, form, or rushing through. Need to get back to 12-15 reps before moving up. Controlled negative, full range of motion, don't rush the reps to compensate for fatigue later in the session. Log where you actually land.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Staying ? you logged this week: 8/6/5 at RPE 9/9/9. That's a rough first session ? reps collapsed hard and RPE was maxed across the board. This is a tough movement and you're new to it. Staying at bodyweight, but drop the target to 6-8 reps this week and actually hit them clean with no swinging. Hang from the bar, raise legs until parallel to the floor, control the descent. Build from a real baseline. Log where you land and we'll build properly from there.

days.cooldown: Stretch quads, hamstrings, hip flexors ? 5 min
